description: New improvements have been added to Amazon GuardDuty multi-account management. With a single click, an AWS Organization’s Delegated Administrator can now specify that ’all’ member accounts should have GuardDuty activated. Previously this capability was restricted to new members joining the AWS Organization. To get started, go to Settings > Accounts in the GuardDuty console.
